flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of the Albemarle rose 28% between 2011 and 2013 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of the Albemarle fell 100% between 2020 and 2023 (5.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of the Albemarle rose 59% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 2.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of the Albemarle rose 37% between 2006 and 2009 (21.0% → 28.8%).
